item.title: Family Business
item.description: Keeping it all in the family has never been this entertaining.

media:content.media:title: Family Business
media:content.media:description: Keeping it all in the family has never been this entertaining.

item.title: Wait for the part they tried to laugh off.
item.description: They tried to play it off but everyone noticed.

media:content.media:title: Wait for the part they tried to laugh off.
media:content.media:description: They tried to play it off but everyone noticed.

item.title: do we want honesty or not?
item.description: Sometimes the truth is the funniest answer.

media:content.media:title: do we want honesty or not?
media:content.media:description: Sometimes the truth is the funniest answer.

item.title: The Grinch gets arrested
item.description: Even the Grinch could not escape the law.

media:content.media:title: The Grinch gets arrested
media:content.media:description: Even the Grinch could not escape the law.

item.title: The second he admitted it, the whole room turned on him.
item.description: One confession was all it took to change the room.

media:content.media:title: The second he admitted it, the whole room turned on him.
media:content.media:description: One confession was all it took to change the room.

item.title: Wait for the moment everyone realizes he meant it.
item.description: The exact moment everyone realizes he was completely serious.

media:content.media:title: Wait for the moment everyone realizes he meant it.
media:content.media:description: The exact moment everyone realizes he was completely serious.

item.title: i totally let her win
item.description: Some victories are earned and some are generously allowed.

media:content.media:title: i totally let her win
media:content.media:description: Some victories are earned and some are generously allowed.

item.title: i know things
item.description: Sometimes knowing just enough is all it takes to surprise everyone.

media:content.media:title: i know things
media:content.media:description: Sometimes knowing just enough is all it takes to surprise everyone.

item.title: Oh no, he said that out loud
item.description: One comment was all it took to change the entire mood of the room.

media:content.media:title: Oh no, he said that out loud
media:content.media:description: One comment was all it took to change the entire mood of the room.

item.title: Some lines land differently once the whole room hears them.
item.description: A single sentence changes completely when everyone else hears it.

media:content.media:title: Some lines land differently once the whole room hears them.
media:content.media:description: A single sentence changes completely when everyone else hears it.

item.title: ooooo i'm super sillyyyyyy
item.description: Pure chaotic energy from someone fully embracing the silliness.

media:content.media:title: ooooo i'm super sillyyyyyy
media:content.media:description: Pure chaotic energy from someone fully embracing the silliness.

item.title: that is not where i thought that was going...
item.description: The unexpected twist makes the ending impossible to predict.

media:content.media:title: that is not where i thought that was going...
media:content.media:description: The unexpected twist makes the ending impossible to predict.

item.title: so i have to shit my pants crazy style to be skinny?
item.description: A hilarious reaction to the absurd logic behind a questionable weight loss idea.

media:content.media:title: so i have to shit my pants crazy style to be skinny?
media:content.media:description: A hilarious reaction to the absurd logic behind a questionable weight loss idea.

item.title: Just wait for the room to turn that confession into a full-blown roast.
item.description: One confession is all it takes for the entire room to pile on with jokes.

media:content.media:title: Just wait for the room to turn that confession into a full-blown roast.
media:content.media:description: One confession is all it takes for the entire room to pile on with jokes.

item.title: the reaction says everything.
item.description: Sometimes one facial expression tells the whole story without a single word.

media:content.media:title: the reaction says everything.
media:content.media:description: Sometimes one facial expression tells the whole story without a single word.

item.title: Anniversary of me on loopy gas
item.description: Reliving the hilarious moments from my unforgettable loopy gas experience one year later.

media:content.media:title: Anniversary of me on loopy gas
media:content.media:description: Reliving the hilarious moments from my unforgettable loopy gas experience one year later.
